data.title: LanzaTech received contract from SED to build an ethanol facility in India using sugarcane bagasse for sustainable fuels.
data.description: On January 27, 2026, in Skokie, Illinois, LanzaTech Global, Inc (LNZA) was granted a contract by Spray Engineering Devices Ltd (SED) for constructing an advanced ethanol plant. The facility will utilize sugarcane bagasse, a common agricultural byproduct, to produce eco-friendly fuels and chemicals. This marks a significant step towards sustainable energy solutions.

data.title: Sandvik reported a Q4 order intake of SEK 32,717M, revenues of SEK 32,461M, and an adjusted EBITA of SEK 6,373M.
data.description: In Stockholm, on January 27, 2026, an order intake of SEK 32,717 million (31,562) was reported, showing a 15% increase at fixed exchange rates. Revenues amounted to SEK 32,461 million (32,151), with revenue growth of 12% at fixed exchange rates. The adjusted EBITA stood at SEK 6,373 million (6,288) in the specified period.

data.title: NetDragon (HK Stock Code: 777) partners with Volcengine to create new AIGC ecosystem, boosting AI innovation.
data.description: In Hong Kong on January 27, 2026, NetDragon Websoft Holdings Limited, known as "NetDragon" and listed as Hong Kong Stock Code: 777, a prominent company in internet community development, has recently formed a partnership for AI ecosystem and innovation collaboration.

data.title: 3Shape appoints Rasmus Hannemann as Senior VP, Portfolio & Product Strategy in Denmark. Effective March 9.
data.description: In Copenhagen, Denmark, on January 27, 2026, 3Shape revealed the hiring of Rasmus Hannemann as the new Senior Vice President of Portfolio & Product Strategy to commence on March 9. Rasmus will join the senior leadership team and will directly report to CEO Jacob Paulsen.

data.title: Billionaire CZ highlights 3 trends in crypto: real-world asset tokenization, NYSE's plan for tokenized US stocks, regulatory hurdles.
data.description: Binance founder Changpeng Zhao recently expressed enthusiasm for three emerging narratives in the cryptocurrency space. At the World Economic Forum Annual Meeting in Davos, Zhao emphasized the potential of tokenization of real-world assets, stating that he is in discussions with several governments on this matter. The New York Stock Exchange announced plans to develop a platform for trading and settlement of tokenized U.S.-listed stocks and ETFs, with 24/7 operations and instant settlement. Nasdaq also submitted a filing to the SEC regarding this. However, regulatory approval is still pending for on-chain versions of stocks and other assets. Zhao's discussions with governments and industry moves towards tokenization reflect a growing trend within the cryptocurrency sector. You can access the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Getinge's Q4 report shows 4.9% organic growth for the year, delivering record-breaking results.
data.description: In Gothenburg, Sweden, on January 27, 2026, Mattias Perjos, President & CEO of Getinge, announced a successful organic growth, with a record-breaking fourth quarter and a 4.9% organic growth for the full year, surpassing their forecast. The company reported increased demand for consumables.

data.title: Government shutdown odds have risen from 10% to 79%, confirming Jeremy Siegel's warning of a sudden closure threat in Washington. Prediction markets indicate a significant market impact.
data.description: Professor Jeremy Siegel has warned of a potential government shutdown in Washington, leading to a sharp increase in probabilities according to prediction markets. Initially seen as a low risk, the odds have now surged to 79% on Polymarket and nearly 77% on Kalshi just days before the deadline. This disruption is said to impede market growth in the short term, as uncertainty rises and investors adjust to the new risks. Siegel's commentary highlights the impact of political events on market fundamentals, emphasizing the need for caution amidst the sudden market shift.

data.title: Virima obtains ISO/IEC 27001:2022 certification, enhancing information security. Key date: Jan. 27, 2026.
data.description: In Atlanta on January 27, 2026, the company Virima, known for its intelligent IT asset management and service mapping solutions, confirmed its attainment of ISO/IEC 27001:2022 certification. This achievement enhances the company's information security measures significantly. Virima is renowned for its expertise in CMDB automation and is trusted by a substantial number of clients for their IT needs.
